Event: Autumn Festival 2023

Sage Bot Item Code: AR32


Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Leader of Hunters Gear

One of the following effects is triggered depending on the unit's current health:
- If they have 20% or less health, the unit's damage is increased by 75%.
- If they have 50% or less health, the unit's damage and crit are increased by 25%.
- If they have 25% or less health, the unit's damage, crit, and dodge are increased by 35%, and the unit's attacks start restoring health equal to 75% of the damage deals.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
